name: saeed-marketplace
description: SAEED (سعيد) — a self-improving directorate of 53 specialist AI engineers for Claude Code, bilingual Arabic/English, with web + native iOS/Android, networking + GPU/AI-systems, an HR lead that staffs the team, a prompt engineer, and two absorbed skill-sets (an elite Design Excellence canon and a parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol). A product of NABAD Computer Solutions L.L.C.

plugins.name: saeed
plugins.description: Self-Advancing Elite Engineering Directorate: 53 specialist subagents + a governance layer (incl. an HR/staffing lead and a prompt engineer), an absorbed Design Excellence canon with a design-review gate, an absorbed parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol, a continuous-improvement loop, and self-upgrade of models and roster.
